# Gcore Edge AI

- [Edge AI](https://gcore.com/docs/edge-ai.md)
- [Getting started](https://gcore.com/docs/edge-ai/getting-started.md): Set up GPU clusters for AI model training or deploy models for inference using Gcore GPU Cloud and Everywhere Inference via Portal or API.
- [Billing](https://gcore.com/docs/edge-ai/billing.md): Track GPU Virtual Machine and Bare Metal charges, Everywhere Inference per-minute compute billing, and monthly resource fee processing with payment failure s...
- [manage-edge-ai-via-mcp-server](https://gcore.com/docs/edge-ai/manage-edge-ai-via-mcp-server.md)

## GPU cloud
- [About GPU Cloud](https://gcore.com/docs/edge-ai/ai-infrastructure/about-gpu-cloud.md): Deploy GPU clusters with Bare Metal, Spot Bare Metal, or Virtual GPU instances; configure H200/H100/A100/L40S nodes with InfiniBand or Ethernet for LLM train...
- [Create a Virtual GPU cluster](https://gcore.com/docs/edge-ai/ai-infrastructure/create-a-virtual-gpu-cluster.md): Provision Virtual GPU cluster nodes with GPU flavors, network boot disks, local data disks, and optional network data disks in Gcore GPU Cloud.
- [Manage a Virtual GPU cluster](https://gcore.com/docs/edge-ai/ai-infrastructure/manage-a-virtual-gpu-cluster.md): Monitor Virtual GPU cluster nodes, manage power state (power on/off, reboot), configure volumes and network interfaces, and delete cluster resources via Gcor...
- [Create a Bare Metal GPU cluster](https://gcore.com/docs/edge-ai/ai-infrastructure/create-a-bare-metal-gpu-cluster.md): Create Bare Metal GPU clusters with dedicated physical servers, configurable node count, GPU models, and InfiniBand networking for distributed AI/ML training...
- [Manage a Bare Metal GPU cluster](https://gcore.com/docs/edge-ai/ai-infrastructure/manage-a-bare-metal-gpu-cluster.md): Monitor and manage Bare Metal GPU cluster nodes, resize clusters by adding/removing nodes, configure network interfaces, manage power states, and delete clus...
- [Spot Bare Metal GPU](https://gcore.com/docs/edge-ai/ai-infrastructure/spot-bare-metal-gpu.md): Deploy discounted Spot Bare Metal GPU clusters with 24-hour reclamation notice for interruptible batch processing, experiments, and development workloads.

## Everywhere inference
- [About Everywhere Inference](https://gcore.com/docs/edge-ai/everywhere-inference.md): Deploy trained AI models on edge inference nodes using Anycast endpoints and Smart Routing for ultra-low latency inference across global regions.
- [Everywhere Inference overview](https://gcore.com/docs/edge-ai/everywhere-inference/overview.md): Deploy trained AI models on edge inference nodes with anycast endpoints and smart routing for low-latency inference across global regions.

## AI models
- [Prepare a custom AI model for deployment](https://gcore.com/docs/edge-ai/everywhere-inference/ai-models/prepare-a-custom-ai-model-for-deployment.md): Package AI models into Docker containers with vLLM or Diffusers, optimize for inference using quantization/pruning, and push to registries for deployment.
- [Deploy an AI model](https://gcore.com/docs/edge-ai/everywhere-inference/ai-models/deploy-an-ai-model.md): Deploy foundational or custom AI models using Gcore Everywhere Inference with Docker container images, catalog models, and public/private registry support.
- [Manage AI model deployments](https://gcore.com/docs/edge-ai/everywhere-inference/ai-models/manage-ai-model-deployments.md): View and modify AI model deployment configurations, endpoint URLs, replica status, hardware settings, autoscaling parameters, and environment variables in Ev...

## Container image registries
- [Manage container image registries](https://gcore.com/docs/edge-ai/everywhere-inference/container-image-registries/manage-registries.md): Configure container image registry credentials and URLs in Gcore Customer Portal Everywhere Inference > Registries for custom AI model deployment.
- [Add a container image registry](https://gcore.com/docs/edge-ai/everywhere-inference/container-image-registries/add-a-registry.md): Configure private and public container image registries in Everywhere Inference with authentication credentials for custom model deployments.

## API keys
- [Create an inference deployment with authorization](https://gcore.com/docs/edge-ai/everywhere-inference/api-keys/create-inference-deployment-with-auth.md): Deploy inference instances with authorization enabled, generate API keys, and authenticate requests using the Authorization header.

## Quotas
- [Request account quota increase](https://gcore.com/docs/edge-ai/everywhere-inference/quotas/request-quota-increase.md): Request quota increase for Everywhere Inference AI model deployments by submitting deployment requirements including vCPU millicores, GPU count, and pod repl...
